temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a middle-aged man with graying hair, wearing a dark suit jacket and a light-colored collared shirt. He is sitting in the back of a car, holding a cigarette to his lips. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting a nighttime setting. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man. The audio begins with the soft, drawn-out sound of someone exhaling from a cigarette, followed by a sharp click, as if a lighter has been put out.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of two men standing outdoors at night. The man on the left, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, gestures with his hands as he speaks to the man on the right. The man on the right, dressed in a dark suit, listens with a slight smile. They are standing near a railing, with a building and some plastic sheeting in the background. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still present in the upper left corner. The camera is stationary, capturing the interaction between the two men. A man then speaks in a light, slightly amused tone, asking, "这么轻松啊?" (So easy?). Another man replies in a calm, matter-of-fact voice, "工作嘛" (It's work). The background is quiet, with no music or other prominent sound effects.
